series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of applications for, and other documents related to the licensing of salespersons, and notices of termination of a salesperson''''''''s employment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for a period of 5 years from the date of approval, denial, renewal or scanned and verified, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain machine readable records on database for 5 years from the date of (Licensee''s, Firm''s) last application, renewal or compliance activity is completed or closed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
